answer: You can apply online through our college admission portal at www.collegeportal.edu/admissions. The process includes filling out the form, uploading documents, and paying the application fee.
The exam timetable is available on the student portal under the 'Exams' section. Dates are typically published 4 weeks before the semester ends.
Placement info is on the Training & Placement cell page. Eligibility is based on academic performance — usually a minimum CGPA of 6.0.
Hostel applications open at the start of each academic year. Contact the hostel warden office for current fees and availability.
